description: Core Web Vitals targets and Lighthouse score floors for every Sovereign-generated app.

lcp.what_it_measures: Perceived load speed — time until the main content of the page is visible

fid.metric: First Input Delay (legacy) / INP: Interaction to Next Paint
fid.what_it_measures: Responsiveness — delay between user interaction and browser response

cls.what_it_measures: Visual stability — unexpected layout shifts as content loads
cls.sovereign_target: < 0.1 — no visible jumps during page load or async data arrival

bundle_size_targets.total_page_weight: < 1MB for initial load on landing page
bundle_size_targets.image_formats: WebP or AVIF preferred over JPEG/PNG for photography

optimization_rules: Code-split routes with React.lazy() and Suspense — don't load all pages upfront
Lazy-load images below the fold (loading='lazy' on )
Preload critical fonts with <link rel='preload'> in index.html
Use CDN for all static assets (Vercel Edge Network handles this automatically)
Avoid blocking render — critical CSS inline, defer non-critical JS
Minimize main thread work — defer analytics and tracking scripts
Use React.memo() and useMemo() only where profiling shows actual re-render cost
Avoid N+1 queries — fetch all required data in one Supabase query with joins or selects
Set cache-control headers on static assets (Vercel does this for /public/ automatically)
Compress API responses — JSON is verbose; use select() to return only needed fields
vite_optimizations: vite build --mode production produces optimized output automatically
manualChunks in vite.config.ts to split vendor libraries into separate chunks
Dynamic import() for page components to enable route-level code splitting
image_best_practices: Always specify width and height on elements to prevent CLS
Use Cloudinary or similar CDN for responsive image transformation
Provide srcset for different device pixel ratios
Use loading='eager' only for above-fold hero images; lazy everywhere else
monitoring: Vercel Analytics (free tier) — real-user CWV data on production traffic
Google Search Console — CWV field data from Chrome users
Lighthouse CI in GitHub Actions — prevent performance regression on every PR
Sentry performance monitoring — transaction tracing for API routes
